prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SONA-FLEX-SHAFT-GRIND-WIRE-IR-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Flexible Shaft Grinder Replacement Wire Double Reinforced Cover 31 Inch Description: The ToolTreaux flexible shaft grinder replacement measures 31” in length and is designed to be compatible with most standard shaft grinder interfaces, so you can replace your old or damaged shaft grinder. It is especially suitable for hard to reach machines that cannot be moved.

Our flexible shaft grinder tool can be used with garden machines and flexible transmission equipment. Use it for home improvement, hobbies, crafts, metalworking and automotive purposes. It easily attaches in seconds and will allow you to access hard to reach pipes, corners, interfaces and more.

This replacement shaft grinder is made of high-quality and durable materials that are wear-resistant and feature a protective durable reinforced cover that will provide good heat dissipation and ensures long-lasting performance. Search Terms: tool accessories bits nails cutting discs rotary tools cordless rotary cutter tool machine tools cutter blades replacement heads tools and home improvement items supplies diy kits automotive exterior accessories tools crafting Features: - 31 INCH GRINDER SHAFT - ToolTreaux flexible shaft grinder replacement measures 31” in length and is compatible with most standard grinder interfaces; replace your old or damaged shaft grinder - VERSATILE AND FLEXIBLE - Replacement shaft grinder especially suitable for machines that cannot be moved. Can be used in garden machines and other hard to move flexible transmission equipment - EASY TO USE - ToolTreaux shaft grinder easily attaches in seconds and allows you to access hard to reach pipes, interfaces, corners and more. Use for home improvement, hobby crafts, automotive and metalworking - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Flexible shaft grinder tool is made of high-quality materials that are wear-resistant, featuring protective double reinforced cover that provides good heat dissipation to ensure long-lasting performance - SPECIFICATIONS - Wire length: 31”; Compatibility: fits most flexible shaft grinders; Colors: black and chrome; Protective double reinforced cover; Weight: .7lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 31 Inch Flexible Shaft Grinder Replacement Wire

anthropic.title_differentiation: Double Reinforced Cover, Wear-Resistant, Heat Dissipation, Hard To Reach Access, Compatible Most Grinders
